prompt: These defect causes are in a jumbled order. Long-press and drag the bars into descending order (biggest first) — the cumulative % line and the 80% marker update as you sort. Then TAP the vital few (the bars that together reach 80%).
caption: 80/20: a few causes drive most of the effect.

causes.label: 'Wiring'
causes.why: '52% of defects — the single biggest driver; fix this first.'

causes.label: 'Solder'
causes.why: '30% — with Wiring that’s 82%, just past the 80% line, so these two are the vital few.'

causes.label: 'Align'
causes.why: '10% — a trivial-many cause, below the 80% line.'

causes.label: 'Label'
causes.why: '5% — minor.'

causes.label: 'Pack'
causes.why: '3% — minor.'

explanation: Sorted descending, the cumulative line climbs steeply then flattens. Wiring (52%) + Solder (30%) = 82% — the vital few worth tackling first; the rest are the trivial many.

prompt: These support-ticket causes are jumbled. Long-press and drag the bars into descending order (biggest first) — the cumulative line and the 80% marker update live. Then TAP the vital few that together reach 80%.
caption: 80/20: focus effort where it pays off most.

causes.label: 'Login'
causes.why: '48% of tickets — the top cause; address first.'

causes.label: 'Billing'
causes.why: '34% — with Login that’s 82%, past the 80% line: the vital few.'

causes.label: 'Sync'
causes.why: '9% — below the line, a trivial-many cause.'

causes.label: 'UI'
causes.why: '6% — minor.'

causes.label: 'Docs'
causes.why: '3% — minor.'

explanation: Login (48%) + Billing (34%) = 82% of tickets — the vital few. Fixing those two clears most of the volume; the remaining causes are the trivial many.

prompt: These project-delay causes are jumbled. Long-press and drag the bars into descending order — the cumulative line and 80% marker update live. Then TAP the vital few that together reach 80%.

causes.label: 'Reqs'
causes.why: '34% — the top delay cause.'

causes.label: 'Data'
causes.why: '26% — part of the vital few.'

causes.label: 'Env'
causes.why: '20% — this THIRD bar tips the cumulative to 80%, so it is in the vital few.'

causes.label: 'Access'
causes.why: '12% — below the line, a trivial-many cause.'

causes.label: 'Comms'
causes.why: '8% — minor.'

explanation: Reqs (34%) + Data (26%) + Env (20%) = 80% — here it takes THREE causes to reach the line, not two. The remaining two are the trivial many.

prompt: These outage causes are jumbled. Long-press and drag the bars into descending order — the cumulative line and 80% marker update live. Then TAP the vital few that together reach 80%.

causes.label: 'DB'
causes.why: '62% — one dominant cause; fixing it alone gets you most of the way.'

causes.label: 'Net'
causes.why: '20% — with DB that is 82%, the vital few.'

causes.label: 'Cfg'
causes.why: '9% — below the line, trivial many.'

causes.label: 'Disk'
causes.why: '5% — minor.'

causes.label: 'Cert'
causes.why: '4% — minor.'

explanation: A steep Pareto: DB alone is 62%, and DB + Net = 82%. When one cause dominates, the vital few can be very small — focus almost entirely there.
